continuation_of: GFX-PKT-006C / R1 / R2 / R3 (the R3 synthetic foundation is on main at/after 6dfe22a)
authorising_records: GFX-EVD-006C-M1 — PM Reconciliation of PR #34 Main Merge and R4 Gate Block v0.1
GFX-ADR-DATA-005 — Retain PR #34 Main Merge and Remediate Forward v0.1

remediation_results.exact_instant_primitive: contracts.UtcInstant (immutable, total-ordering) + parse_canonical_utc_instant validate the whole-second component via datetime.fromisoformat (rejecting impossible calendar/time) and store an integer epoch second (calendar.timegm; no float) plus an exact fractions.Fraction over the full fractional-digit string; every admitted digit participates in comparison and the instant is exactly comparable with a bare integer Unix epoch second. ContractError on non-string/non-canonical/impossible/non-UTC, with no value text in the message.
remediation_results.exact_utc_representation: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss(.<one-or-more digits>)?Z; arbitrary fractional precision (NOT restricted to six digits); no dependency added.
remediation_results.seventh_plus_digit_ordering: parse('....0000009Z') < parse('....0000010Z') is True; covered start .0000009Z rejects observation .0000001Z (ContractError) and rejects a bar at the same whole-second epoch (TimezoneError); availability .0000001Z is rejected for observation .0000009Z while .0000010Z passes (research point-in-time ordering).
remediation_results.trailing_zero_equality: .1Z == .10Z == .100Z (equal value and equal hash); trailing-zero covered start equals a trailing-zero observation at the start boundary.
remediation_results.shared_primitive_use_sites: timezone.validate_timezone_evidence + timezone.gate_for_normalisation (whole-second bar epochs compared directly against the exact covered interval); tools/research_smoke._parse_utc (ContractError translated to the established ValueError without exposing parser internals); storage._parse_manifest_instant (field-specific regex retained as a shape gate, semantic/exact validation via the shared parser; StorageError on failure). No new acquired/received ordering rule was introduced.
remediation_results.impossible_time_governed: month/day/hour/minute/second out-of-range values raise ContractError (timezone, research) or StorageError (manifest) — never raw ValueError to the caller.
remediation_results.quarantine_request_binding: Strict manifest validation now parses and validate_request()s the exact stored request.json for every ordinary QUARANTINED object: requires a JSON object, parsed request_id == manifest.raw_object_id == expected request-id directory, and manifest source_id/account_scope/symbol/timeframe/representation/range_start/range_end/range_semantics equal to the validated stored request. Identity/range/path derive from the stored request, never the manifest.
remediation_results.canonical_byte_rule: Ordinary reasons (invalid_json, contract_invalid:*, request/response byte conflict) require request_bytes == canonical_json_bytes(parsed request). The reason 'noncanonical_request_bytes' permits attempted bytes only when they strict-decode to a valid request AND differ from canonical encoding, with all identity/path fields derived from the parsed request; the object stays QUARANTINED/conflict evidence and never becomes accepted or idempotent. Any other reason with noncanonical bytes fails closed.
remediation_results.quarantine_directory_and_id: Directory quarantine/mt5/{source}/{scope}/{symbol}/{timeframe}/{YYYY}/{MM}/{request_id}/{quarantine_id} with all components except the tail derived from the validated stored request; the 16-lowercase-hex tail is recomputed as sha256(request_bytes + NUL + response_bytes + NUL + reason)[:16] and must equal the directory tail. Changing request bytes, response bytes, reason, request identity or the tail fails closed. Security-stop records under quarantine/security/ remain digest-only and outside this manifest contract.
remediation_results.malformed_response_retention: Malformed (non-JSON) and contract-invalid (valid-JSON but failing the success contract) responses remain readable QUARANTINED evidence with stored-file checksums matching the manifest; a quarantined response is never validated against the success-response contract.
remediation_results.publication_governed_failure: publish_observations validates the request FIRST (before indexing request_id or any field); a missing request_id, a non-dict request, or a wrong-typed field raises ContractError/PublicationError (never raw KeyError/TypeError) and returns no records. The exact response-byte/object/SHA checks, request/response match, timezone gate and private mapper order are retained.

tests.exact_time_matrix: TestExactInstantPrimitive (seventh-digit ordering, trailing-zero equality+hash, no-fraction/ms/us ordering, integer-epoch comparison without float, impossible values governed, non-canonical/non-string rejected); TestTimezoneFractional R4 additions (seventh-digit start vs earlier observation and same-second bar, trailing-zero start equals observation); TestUtcSemantics research additions (seventh-digit availability ordering, trailing-zero availability equals observation); TestManifestProvenance.test_manifest_instants_use_exact_parser_no_new_ordering.
tests.quarantine_provenance_matrix: TestQuarantineProvenance (12 tests): malformed-response readable + checksums; contract-invalid readable + stays QUARANTINED; conflict readable when request canonical; independent identity-field changes fail closed; noncanonical request fails for ordinary reason even with realigned checksum; noncanonical special readable + never ALREADY_PRESENT; invalid request fingerprint fails closed; changed reason fails closed; changed 16-hex tail fails closed; exact bytes recompute the stored id; tampered/missing/symlink files fail closed; accepted + idempotency remain green.
tests.publication_matrix: TestGatedPublication R4 additions (missing request_id, non-dict request, invalid request field type, governed failure returns no records).
tests.regression: All prior accepted-object, idempotency, concurrency/staging, late-race, HTTP, security-stop, publication and Parquet/DuckDB tests remain green.

expected_results: Every admitted fractional digit participates in instant comparison; trailing zeros are equal; impossible values fail through governed errors
Timezone gating and research point-in-time ordering use one shared exact-instant primitive
Every ordinary quarantine derives identity/range/path from its parsed validated stored request; canonical request bytes required except the explicit noncanonical-attempt rule
The 16-hex quarantine id recomputes from exact request bytes + response bytes + reason; any change fails closed
Malformed and contract-invalid responses remain retainable but never accepted
Invalid publication requests produce governed errors and no records
Only authorised files change; no dependency/schema/CI/Make change; R3 evidence change is pointer-only
All five CI jobs pass for the C9 (and C10) push + PR runs
